drift_areas.evidence_for_current_truth: 20 skills found in .opencode/skills/ with SKILL.md files. cli-devin skill added in commit df8395f7e2
drift_areas.drift_description: The README claims 19 skills, but there are now 20 skills. The cli-devin skill was introduced in commit df8395f7e2 'feat(cli-devin): Introduce Devin CLI orchestrator skill for autonomous coding' and is not reflected in the README count.

drift_areas.evidence_for_current_truth: .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/tool-schemas.ts TOOL_DEFINITIONS array contains 39 tools. Commit 602e4c031 dropped 2 redundant tools (memory_quick_search + memory_causal_unlink) from 41 to 39.
.codex/config.toml line 38 states 'Registers 8 tools: advisor_recommend/rebuild/status/validate plus skill_graph_scan/query/status/validate'
